# 📝 Prompts Directory

One-off, reusable prompts for common tasks in the admissions process.

## Organization

- **research/** — University research, program analysis, career path validation
- **applications/** — Application-specific checklists, deadline tracking
- **writing/** — SOP review, resume grading, LOR feedback
- **visa/** — F-1 visa prep, interview scenarios, document checklists

## How to Use

Type `/` in Copilot chat to see available prompts. Each prompt name appears as a command.

**Examples:**
- `/program-analysis` → Deep dive into a specific program
- `/draft-full-sop` → Write a complete 650-word SOP
- `/generate-interview-questions` → Prep for admissions interviews
- `/ats-score-grader` → Evaluate resume ATS compatibility

---

## 📋 Available Prompts by Category

### Research (7 prompts)
- `/program-analysis` — Deep program fit analysis
- `/alumni-career-mapping` — Career paths for program graduates
- `/program-comparison` — Compare two programs head-to-head
- `/job-role-deep-dive` — Understand a specific job role
- `/resume-bullets-analytics-lens` — Rewrite bullets with analytics focus
- `/us-job-market-intelligence` — Top companies & hiring patterns
- `/scholarship-discovery` — Find funding opportunities

### SOP (8 prompts)
- `/extract-core-story` — Identify narrative threads from background
- `/draft-inflection-point` — Write the pivotal moment paragraph
- `/draft-full-sop` — Generate complete school-specific SOP
- `/strengthen-weak-paragraphs` — Improve a specific paragraph
- `/opening-hook-generator` — Create 5 compelling opening sentences
- `/adcom-review-simulation` — Get admissions committee feedback
- `/cut-to-word-limit` — Trim SOP to required length
- `/differentiation-check` — Ensure school-specific uniqueness

### Interview (7 prompts)
**Admissions Interview:**
- `/generate-interview-questions` — 15 common interview questions
- `/mock-interview-answer-review` — Evaluate an interview answer
- `/why-analytics-answer` — Craft the core transition narrative

**F-1 Visa Interview:**
- `/generate-visa-interview-questions` — 25 consular officer questions
- `/visa-answer-review` — Evaluate a visa answer
- `/why-us-visa-answer` — Answer "Why US and not India?"
- `/visa-mock-interview-session` — Full 10-question mock session

### Resume (2 prompts)
- `/ats-score-grader` — Grade resume ATS compatibility (6 dimensions)
- `/resume-generation` — Generate school-specific, optimized resume
